name: Marshmallow Root
summary: Marshmallow root is a mucilage-rich botanical with insufficient clinical evidence but plausible demulcent effects for mucosal irritation.
description: Marshmallow root (Althaea officinalis) contains demulcent polysaccharides that can soothe mucosal surfaces and support symptom relief contexts.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.4: Keep as research/traditional profile only until direct human evidence is added. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.
claimMap.notes: v10.4: Keep as research/traditional profile only until direct human evidence is added. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: No well-supported universal clinical dose; product-specific demulcent use

sources.title: v9.4: Mostly animal/preclinical and influencer hype; keep out of monetization until human evidence exists. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.
